requirement_topic.en: BPC Grid Connection for BESS — 50 Hz System, BERA Licensing, IEC 62933, and Botswana-Specific Grid Conditions
requirement_topic.zh: BPC BESS并网——50 Hz系统、BERA许可、IEC 62933及博茨瓦纳专项电网条件
requirement_topic.zht: BPC BESS併網——50 Hz系統、BERA許可、IEC 62933及波札那專項電網條件

summary.en: BPC (Botswana Power Corporation) is the state-owned national utility and is the grid operator responsible for transmission and distribution in Botswana. All grid-connected BESS installations — including utility-scale projects co-located with solar PV — require BERA (Botswana Energy Regulatory Authority) licensing and BPC grid-connection approval before commissioning. BERA was established under the Botswana Energy Regulatory Authority Act (effective 1 April 2017) and licenses generation, co-generation, storage, transmission, single-buyer, distribution, and retail electricity activities. Botswana's grid operates at 230 V single-phase and 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz. The national transmission backbone comprises 400 kV, 220 kV, and 132 kV lines; distribution operates at 33 kV and 11 kV with sub-transmission at 66 kV. BESS power conversion systems (PCS) — bidirectional inverters — must be designed, configured, and validated for Botswana's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid. Botswana is actively developing utility-scale BESS: a 50 MW / 200 MWh World Bank-supported project (co-located with 100 MW solar PV at Selebi Phikwe/Mmadinare and Jwaneng) was under development as of the dataset date. Project-specific BESS grid-connection technical requirements — including any IEC 62933 series evidence required by BPC or project owners — must be obtained directly from BPC and BERA; no publicly accessible standalone BPC BESS technical specification had been confirmed as of the dataset date.
summary.zh: BPC（博茨瓦纳电力公司）是国有国家电力公司，是博茨瓦纳输配电系统的电网运营商。所有并网BESS装置——包括与太阳能光伏协同配置的公用事业规模项目——在投入使用前须取得BERA（博茨瓦纳能源监管局）许可和BPC并网批准。BERA依据《博茨瓦纳能源监管局法》（2017年4月1日起生效）设立，负责发电、热电联产、储能、输电、单一购买方、配电及零售电力活动的许可。博茨瓦纳电网运行参数为单相230 V、三相400 V、50 Hz。全国输电骨干网由400 kV、220 kV和132 kV线路组成；配电网在33 kV和11 kV运行，次输电在66 kV运行。BESS储能变流器（PCS）——双向逆变器——须针对博茨瓦纳230/400 V、50 Hz电网进行设计、配置和验证。博茨瓦纳正在积极开发公用事业规模BESS：截至本数据集日期，一个世界银行支持的50 MW/200 MWh项目（与塞莱比-皮奎/马迪纳里和竞雄各100 MW太阳能光伏项目协同配置）正在开发中。包括BPC或项目业主要求的IEC 62933系列证据在内的项目专属BESS并网技术要求，须直接向BPC和BERA获取；截至本数据集日期，尚未确认BPC公开发布的独立BESS技术规格文件。
summary.zht: BPC（波札那電力公司）是國有國家電力公司，是波札那輸配電系統的電網運營商。所有併網BESS裝置——包括與太陽能光伏協同配置的公用事業規模項目——在投入使用前須取得BERA（波札那能源監管局）許可和BPC併網批准。BERA依據《波札那能源監管局法》（2017年4月1日起生效）設立，負責發電、熱電聯產、儲能、輸電、單一購買方、配電及零售電力活動的許可。波札那電網運行參數為單相230 V、三相400 V、50 Hz。全國輸電骨幹網由400 kV、220 kV和132 kV線路組成；配電網在33 kV和11 kV運行，次輸電在66 kV運行。BESS儲能變流器（PCS）——雙向逆變器——須針對波札那230/400 V、50 Hz電網進行設計、配置和驗證。波札那正在積極開發公用事業規模BESS：截至本數據集日期，一個世界銀行支持的50 MW/200 MWh項目（與塞萊比-皮奎/馬迪納里和競雄各100 MW太陽能光伏項目協同配置）正在開發中。包括BPC或項目業主要求的IEC 62933系列證據在內的項目專屬BESS併網技術要求，須直接向BPC和BERA獲取；截至本數據集日期，尚未確認BPC公開發布的獨立BESS技術規格文件。

standards_or_laws: Botswana Energy Regulatory Authority Act (effective 1 April 2017) — establishes BERA and mandates licensing for generation, storage, transmission, distribution, and retail electricity activities
BERA generation and storage licence — required before commissioning any grid-connected BESS in Botswana
BPC grid-connection approval — required for all grid-connected BESS; technical terms defined in project-level connection agreement
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected project-specification reference)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference)
Botswana grid standard: 230 V single-phase, 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase) — different from Botswana's 230/400 V. PCS firmware and protection parameters configured for China's 220/380 V grid must be re-parameterised for Botswana's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid conditions before grid-connection testing and commissioning. Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy BERA or BPC requirements.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2023（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V）——与博茨瓦纳230/400 V不同。针对中国220/380 V电网配置的PCS固件和保护参数，须在并网测试和调试前重新针对博茨瓦纳230/400 V、50 Hz电网条件进行参数配置。中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足BERA或BPC要求。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2023（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V）——與波札那230/400 V不同。針對中國220/380 V電網配置的PCS韌體和保護參數，須在併網測試和調試前重新針對波札那230/400 V、50 Hz電網條件進行參數配置。中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足BERA或BPC要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2023 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy BERA licensing or BPC grid-connection requirements. Key differences requiring attention: (a) grid voltage — Botswana is 230/400 V whereas China is 220/380 V; PCS voltage protection thresholds and ride-through settings must be reconfigured and retested for Botswana grid conditions; (b) BERA generation and storage licence — a BERA licence is required before commissioning any grid-connected BESS; engage BERA early to determine applicable licence category and conditions for storage assets; (c) BPC project-specific connection agreement — engage BPC at the earliest project stage to obtain technical grid-connection requirements before equipment design is finalised; (d) IEC 62933 series compliance — where project specifications or BPC connection agreements require IEC 62933-2-1 or IEC 62933-5-2 evidence, prepare test and design documentation accordingly; Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent; (e) high ambient temperature derating — Botswana's Kalahari desert environment can reach peak ambient temperatures above 40°C; BESS thermal management, battery derating curves, and enclosure cooling must be sized for local conditions, not China-standard test conditions; (f) communication protocols — confirm the SCADA / communication interface protocol required by BPC for BESS monitoring (IEC 61850, DNP3, or project-specific specification).
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足BERA许可或BPC并网要求。需注意的主要差异：（a）电网电压——博茨瓦纳为230/400 V，中国为220/380 V；PCS电压保护阈值和穿越参数须重新针对博茨瓦纳电网条件进行配置和测试；（b）BERA发电和储能许可——在任何并网BESS投入使用前须取得BERA许可；应尽早与BERA接触，确定储能资产适用的许可类别和条件；（c）BPC项目专属并网协议——在设备设计最终确定前，应在项目最早阶段与BPC接触，获取电网并网技术要求；（d）IEC 62933系列合规——若项目规格或BPC并网协议要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2证据，须相应准备测试和设计文件；中国GB/T标准不被接受为等效依据；（e）高温降额——博茨瓦纳卡拉哈里沙漠环境峰值环境温度可超过40°C；BESS热管理、电池降额曲线和机柜冷却须根据当地条件而非中国标准测试条件进行设计；（f）通信协议——确认BPC对BESS监控所要求的SCADA/通信接口协议（IEC 61850、DNP3或项目专属规格）。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足BERA許可或BPC併網要求。需注意的主要差異：（a）電網電壓——波札那為230/400 V，中國為220/380 V；PCS電壓保護閾值和穿越參數須重新針對波札那電網條件進行配置和測試；（b）BERA發電和儲能許可——在任何併網BESS投入使用前須取得BERA許可；應盡早與BERA接觸，確定儲能資產適用的許可類別和條件；（c）BPC項目專屬併網協議——在設備設計最終確定前，應在項目最早階段與BPC接觸，獲取電網併網技術要求；（d）IEC 62933系列合規——若項目規格或BPC併網協議要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2證據，須相應準備測試和設計文件；中國GB/T標準不被接受為等效依據；（e）高溫降額——波札那卡拉哈里沙漠環境峰值環境溫度可超過40°C；BESS熱管理、電池降額曲線和機櫃冷卻須根據當地條件而非中國標準測試條件進行設計；（f）通訊協議——確認BPC對BESS監控所要求的SCADA/通訊接口協議（IEC 61850、DNP3或項目專屬規格）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — BERA generation/storage licence and BPC grid-connection approval are required for all grid-connected BESS in Botswana; technical requirements are project-specific and defined in the BERA licence conditions and BPC connection agreement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558-2023 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Botswana

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy BERA licensing or BPC Botswana grid-connection requirements. BERA generation/storage licence must be obtained before commissioning. BESS PCS must be re-parameterised for Botswana's 230/400 V at 50 Hz grid. Engage BERA and BPC at the earliest project stage to determine licence conditions, connection agreement technical requirements, applicable IEC 62933 evidence, SCADA/communication protocol specifications, and high-temperature derating requirements. No publicly accessible BPC technical specification specifically for BESS grid connection has been confirmed as of the dataset date — direct BERA and BPC engagement is essential before equipment procurement is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足BERA许可或BPC博茨瓦纳并网要求。须在投入使用前取得BERA发电/储能许可。BESS储能变流器须重新针对博茨瓦纳230/400 V 50 Hz电网进行参数配置。应在项目最早阶段与BERA和BPC接触，确定许可条件、并网协议技术要求、适用IEC 62933证据、SCADA/通信协议规格及高温降额要求。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认BPC公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格——在设备采购最终确定前，直接与BERA和BPC接触至关重要。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足BERA許可或BPC波札那併網要求。須在投入使用前取得BERA發電/儲能許可。BESS儲能變流器須重新針對波札那230/400 V 50 Hz電網進行參數配置。應在項目最早階段與BERA和BPC接觸，確定許可條件、併網協議技術要求、適用IEC 62933證據、SCADA/通訊協議規格及高溫降額要求。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認BPC公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格——在設備採購最終確定前，直接與BERA和BPC接觸至關重要。
